The '''Ketes''' were a large [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] species that resided on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor (planet)/Legends|Endor]]. A group of Ketes lived inside a [[Kete hive|hive]] on the Endor moon, although they usually lived in spiral mounds made out of a sticky substance.
